name: PLL Parity
description: PLL Parity algorithms for 4x4 — 22 cases. Fixes parity errors during the PLL step where two edges or corners need to be swapped in a way impossible on a 3x3.

Uw2 Rw2 U2 2R2 U2 Rw2 Uw2
